reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza el arquitecto, el edificio no se adapta al clima de Río Gallegos. Los ambientes no están interconectados, los baños están al exterior y la puerta está expuesta a los vientos predominantes.

(Translated by Google)
The architect is a disgrace; the building is ill-suited to the Río Gallegos climate. The rooms are not interconnected, the bathrooms are outside, and the door is exposed to the prevailing winds.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGNnN6YnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar muy lindo.
Crítica: esperamos 25 minutos, reloj, para que nos sirvan 2 cortados y 1 chocolate. Había una sola persona que tenía que atender al público del salón , preparar cafés y  cobrar en la caja.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice.
Review: We waited 25 minutes, clockwise, to be served two cortados and one hot chocolate. There was only one person who had to serve the customers in the café, prepare coffees, and handle payments at the register.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGcVBDVTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
FELICITACIONES A.C.A., y felicitaciones al concesionario. Me enorgullece como socio del ACA. Sin duda una de las más lindas y modernas del país. Y excelentemente bien atendida por todos los jóvenes que atienden el FULL. Gracias!!!! (28/10/23, 17hs)

(Translated by Google)
Congratulations A.C.A., and congratulations to the dealership. I'm proud as an ACA member. Without a doubt, one of the nicest and most modern dealerships in the country. And excellent service from all the young people who work at the FULL dealership. Thank you!!!! (10/28/23, 5 PM)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGaWREQUVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente  remodelación que deja a este lugar cómo uno de los más lindos de la provincia . A la altura de las grandes capitales , esta estacion además  tiene la ventaja de estar en la ría.. frente al paseo costero con vista a el. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent renovation that makes this one of the most beautiful places in the province. On par with those in major cities, this station also has the advantage of being on the estuary, facing the waterfront promenade with a view of it. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1MGV1NXNRRRAB
